name: laravel-facade-resolver
description: Quickly resolve Laravel Facades to their bound classes on hover. Designed to speed up PHPStan Level 10 development.

commands.title: Laravel: Refactor All Facades to Constructor Injection

laravelFacadeResolver.enable.description: Enable or disable the facade hover resolution.

laravelFacadeResolver.education.showSrpW.description: Show warnings when a class has too many dependencies (SRP violation).

laravelFacadeResolver.education.srpThres.description: The number of dependencies before triggering an SRP warning.

laravelFacadeResolver.education.showSoli.description: Show educational SOLID principles tips in hovers.

laravelFacadeResolver.education.density.description: Controls how much educational content appears in tooltips.

laravelFacadeResolver.validation.enableC.description: Validate config() keys against your /config files.

laravelFacadeResolver.validation.enableV.description: Validate view() names against Blade files.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
